task_description: Wire bark voice-line audio playback into the running game: instantiate BarkAudioPlayer in SliceScreen, fire combat barks (taunts, damage reactions, death, healing, victory), fire exploration barks on room/enemy encounters, and fire ambient idle barks after 30s of inactivity.

verification.summary: All 88 tests pass (74 pre-existing + 14 new CombatBarkIntegrationTest). Tests cover combat taunts, damage reactions, death barks, victory barks, heal action (HP restoration and bark trigger), and Combatant.heal() edge cases. Tests use seeded Random for deterministic verification.
